"Black Stone on a White Stone" is by César Vallejo, who was fictionalized as Monsieur Pain in a novel by this author of The Savage Detectives.
Vallejo's avant-garde poetry collection Trilce, which uses deliberate misspellings and unusual syntax, anticipates features of this literary movement whose "manifesto" was written by André Breton.
